title: SciBet as a portable and fast single cell type identifier.
author: Li C Liu B Kang B Liu Z Liu Y Chen C Ren X Zhang Z
content: S-EPMC7156687 PMC7156687 SciBet as a portable and fast single cell type identifier. Fast, robust and technology-independent computational methods are needed for supervised cell type annotation of single-cell RNA sequencing data.
